memberdef.argsstring: (const UiColor &target, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: BackgroundColor

briefdescription.para: Animates the background color.

memberdef.argsstring: (const UiColor &relative, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: BackgroundColorBy

briefdescription.para: Animates the background color by a relative amount.

memberdef.argsstring: (float target, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: SizeWidth

briefdescription.para: Animates the size width.

memberdef.argsstring: (float relative, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: SizeWidthBy

briefdescription.para: Animates the size width by a relative amount.

memberdef.argsstring: (float target, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())

briefdescription.para: Animates the size height.

memberdef.argsstring: (float relative, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: SizeHeightBy

briefdescription.para: Animates the size height by a relative amount.

briefdescription.para: Animates the scale y by a relative amount.

briefdescription.para: Animates the opacity by a relative amount.

briefdescription.para: Animates the position x.

briefdescription.para: Animates the borderline offset.

memberdef.argsstring: (float relative, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: BorderlineOffsetBy

briefdescription.para: Animates the borderline offset by a relative amount.

memberdef.argsstring: (const UiColor &target, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: TextColor

briefdescription.para: Animates the text color.

memberdef.argsstring: (const UiColor &relative, Duration duration, AlphaFunction alpha=AlphaFunction(), Duration delay=Duration())
memberdef.name: TextColorBy

briefdescription.para: Animates the text color by a relative amount.

memberdef.argsstring: (Animation animation, Label view)
memberdef.name: LabelAnimationBridge

briefdescription.para: A lightweight bridge for applying animations to a Label.

detaileddescription.para: LabelAnimationBridge extends ViewAnimationBridge with Label-specific animation properties. All parent properties are also available with proper return type for fluent chaining.
